understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to navigate the player horizontally and then fall in the gravity direction to eventually reach the goal gem tile (+), while avoiding hazards such as spikes (u/v) and making use of support tiles or breakable blocks to open paths.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: After each left or right move, the player falls automatically in the current gravity direction until supported or stopped. Clicking can remove breakable tiles (x) to open new paths. Hazards instantly lose the game when landed on, and only one action can be taken per turn. Undo allows recovery from mistaken actions but was not used this episode.
